content: Cyberpunk 2020 uses nine stats (INT, REF, TECH, COOL, ATTR, LUCK, MA, BODY, EMP). Skill checks are typically Stat + Skill + 1d10 vs a Difficulty Value (DV). EMP can drop from cyberware (Humanity loss).

Friday Night Firefight (FNFF): Head hits double damage before armor. Stopping Power (SP) at a location reduces damage; ablation can wear armor down. Body Type Modifier (BTM) further reduces damage that gets through. Track damage points on the wound track; stun/death saves use d10 vs targets from the rules.
Netrunning uses Interface skill with the character's deck stats (CPU, Speed, Data Wall, etc.). Actions in the Net are abstracted; the GM sets DV and consequences for intrusion.
Economy is in eurobucks (eb). Prices in gear lists are guidelines; availability rolls may be needed for restricted gear.
